raw.message: Jouez des Spin&Go et tentez de gagner jusqu’à 1 million €

hook.summary: Fast-paced introduction to PokerStars Spin & Go featuring quick gameplay.
hook.visual_action: Logo animation transitions to a mobile device displaying a winning poker hand.
hook.text_overlay: SPIN & GO JOUEZ DES PARTIES ULTRA-RAPIDES
hook.voiceover_transcript: Spin and Go Pokerstars. Jouez des parties ultra-rapides

scene_flow: Introductory logo screen for PokerStars Spin & Go.
Gameplay footage on a smartphone showing a winning hand of pocket kings.
Visual confirmation of a win with 'GAGNANT' overlay.
Promotional offer screen with 100% bonus and app store download links.
audience_proxy: Adult male poker enthusiasts in France looking for quick, high-stakes mobile gaming.
